tools.name: download_tiktok
tools.title: Download TikTok video
tools.description: Get direct download links for a TikTok video (no watermark HD, plus MP3 audio). Accepts any TikTok URL including vt.tiktok.com and vm.tiktok.com short links.

tools.name: download_pinterest
tools.title: Download Pinterest video or image
tools.description: Get a direct download link for a Pinterest pin (video or image) in the highest quality available. Accepts pinterest.com pin URLs and pin.it short links.

url.description: The Pinterest pin URL (e.g. https://pin.it/xxxx or https://www.pinterest.com/pin/12345).

tools.name: list_tiktok_profile_videos
tools.title: List TikTok profile videos
tools.description: Fetch a list of recent public videos for a TikTok profile (up to ~30). Useful for batch downloading. Accepts a @username or a full profile URL.

username.description: TikTok username (with or without @), or a full profile URL like https://www.tiktok.com/@user.
